rationale: The cited 2017 paper appears in grouped citations as part of broad background on healthy versus unhealthy food choice and atmospheric influences, including one mention alongside other work on ambient factors such as lighting. In the citing paper, it is not discussed in detail, and there is no clear reuse of its specific mechanism, design, measures, or empirical findings to develop or test the focal hypotheses about ambient scent. Because the citation functions mainly as general literature positioning rather than a distinct building block, the role is best classified as mention only.
